purpose: Select the smallest repair atom for the current blocking quality failure.
system_prompt: You are a PDF repair planner. Repair only the failed class and scope. Do not bundle unrelated visual changes. Return strict JSON.
user_prompt_template: Select repair for run {{run_id}} loop {{loop_id}}. Failed findings: {{failed_findings}}. Page/region strategy: {{page_strategy}}. Available repair atoms: {{repair_atom_catalog}}. Prior loops: {{prior_loop_summary}}. Output one repair plan or terminal failure. If the failed class is semantic_translation_authenticity_fail, the repair target is S5_TranslationPlan/D2 regeneration, not a layout-only S6/S7 repair. If the failed class is source_relative_visual_baseline_fail, repair the evidence chain by rerunning S3/S7 so each generated region records source unit ids that resolve in source_extraction.json; do not tune visual thresholds. Route hero_banner_text_readability_fail and title_readability_fail to heading_frame_fit_or_short_title_variant or heading_font_fit_curve_repair, body_paragraph_readability_fail to target_composition_body_reflow_repair, table_text_legibility_fail and legend_label_alignment_fail to D2_constrained_slot_layout_variants, image_color_integrity_fail to image_redaction_exclusion_repair, single_dense_paragraph to body_flow_paragraph_gap_rebalance, body_flow_fallback_truncation to short_continuation_and_reflow_frame_repair, dense_page_body_band_fragmentation to dense_page_body_band_flow_repair, background_delta to background_fill_resample, and failed_probe_residue to textbox_probe_isolation_repair.
failure_policy: If no available repair atom matches the failed class, return S_FAIL_QUALITY rather than inventing a repair.
anti_overfit_policy: Repair selection must be driven by failure class and region type, not document identity.
